scenarios.title: Clean architecture repo named App.Domain
scenarios.expected: Expected no rename solely due to DDD-neutral policy.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-architecture-pragmatic. Scenario: Clean architecture repo named App.Domain. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected no rename solely due to DDD-neutral policy.
